content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.expression_engine
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/expression_engine.py (537 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Expression Engine - Maps AI responses and sentiment to avatar expressions
Integrates with Cosmos swarm for multi-agent personality blending

CLASSES:
- Emotion(Enum): Core emotions for avatar expression
- ExpressionState: Complete expression state for the avatar
  Methods: def to_avatar_params(self) -> Dict[str, float]
- ExpressionEngine: Maps AI responses to avatar expressions

Features:
- Sentiment analysis for emot
  Methods: async def analyze_response(self, text: str, agent_name: Optional[str]=None) -> ExpressionState
  Methods: def blend_expressions(self, expressions: List[ExpressionState], weights: Optional[List[float]]=None)
  Methods: def get_gesture_suggestion(self, emotion: Emotion, context: Optional[str]=None) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def interpolate_state(self, current: ExpressionState, target: ExpressionState, factor: float=None) -
  Methods: async def generate_idle_expression(self) -> ExpressionState
